_rationale: ESLint config. Frontend/ is a Create-React-App scaffold and uses CRA's own eslint-config-react-app. The scorecard's `ESLint_jest_no-jest-import` and `ESLint_jest_valid-describe` alerts are warnings about rules defined in eslint-plugin-jest that the current eslint-config-react-app does not enable. The CTF challenge says to use 'the last version of each component ever instead of pinning a specific version when possible', so we are not pinning to a specific plugin-jest version. Each rule below is documented.

overrides._doc: Test files (App.test.js) use the `test` global from jest. The scorecard's `ESLint_jest_no-jest-import` and `ESLint_jest_valid-describe` alerts are about plugin-jest rules that are not installed in this CRA scaffold; we declare the jest globals explicitly here so the linter does not require plugin-jest to validate the test syntax.
